prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I provide financial advice. Stock market predictions are inherently uncertain due to numerous unpredictable factors. My prediction is based on a statistical model that estimates future price movements using historical volatility as a proxy for future uncertainty. For NKE, I've used an estimated annualized volatility of approximately 25%. This translates to a 7-day standard deviation for price movements of about $2.64 from the current price level. The point estimate reflects a neutral forecast over a short period. The confidence intervals are calculated by applying z-scores corresponding to each confidence level to this estimated 7-day price standard deviation around the point estimate.
